Log:
  - Added LICENSE
  - Take maintainership

Modified:

Modified: head/devel/p5-Test-WWW-Mechanize-Catalyst/Makefile

--- head/devel/p5-Test-WWW-Mechanize-Catalyst/Makefile	Sun May 25 07:34:26 2014	(r355136)
+++ head/devel/p5-Test-WWW-Mechanize-Catalyst/Makefile	Sun May 25 07:39:10 2014	(r355137)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	perl@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Test::WWW::Mechanize for Catalyst
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Catalyst-Runtime>=5.9000:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Catalyst-Runtime \
 		p5-Moose>=0.67:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Moose \
 		p5-Test-WWW-Mechanize>=1.14:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-WWW-Mechanize \
@@ -27,4 +30,3 @@ USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
